series_metadata.series_description: All projections for future student enrollment within a school district done by the agency or its consultants, including but not limited to updated projections and related documents, and used as part of the development of a Master Facilities Plan for the district.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until converted to electronic format or until project close-out. ; Electronic: Until project close-out., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
